publishedAbstract: - During a `podman` pull request the backing filesystem is labelled as unknown: `backingFs= `- During a `podman` pull request a filesystem specific operation failed: `Error setting up pivot dir: mkdir /home/foo/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay`- On further inspection the filesystem type/or ID returned by the `statfs(2)` system call was `0x65735546`
publishedTitle: During a podman pull request the backing filesystem is labelled as unknown: backingFs=<unknown>
